reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: Comparing the page content of the source PDF with the output JSON reveals that several pages are missing. Specifically, content from Page 5 (Title slide), Page 6 (Campaign Overview), Page 7 (Spectrum Reach Campaign metrics), Page 14 (URLs Accessed summary), and Page 15 (Spectrum Reach and Website Analytics) is entirely absent. The reading order in the JSON shows significant gaps where these pages should be (e.g., jumping from reading order index 29 to 47, and 113 to 122) without any placeholder
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source document contains Page 6 titled 'Campaign Overview' with bullet points regarding the partnership with Spectrum Reach, and Page 14 titled 'URLs Accessed from the Recruitment Webpage' with statistics on clicks.
concerns.output_quote: The output JSON lacks any mention of the 'Campaign Overview' or 'URLs Accessed' content. The reading order jumps from index 29 (end of Page 4) to index 47 (start of Page 8), and from index 113 (end of Page 13) to index 122 (start of Page 16).

concerns.analysis: The HTML output is missing several meaningful and non-decorative images that are present in the source PDF slides. Specifically, the geographic map of the Durham Zone (page 8), the collage of network logos (page 9), and multiple Google Analytics data visualization charts (pages 10, 11, and 12) are absent from the converted output. These elements are critical for understanding the data presented in the slides.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Geographic map of Durham Zone (p. 8), network logo collage (p. 9), Google Analytics charts including line graph, bar chart, and pie charts (pp. 10, 11, 12).
concerns.output_quote: The rendered HTML for these sections contains the text and tables but excludes the corresponding maps, logos, and charts.
concerns.location: Sections corresponding to PDF pages 8, 9, 10, 11, and 12.

concerns.analysis: Several ordered (numbered) lists in the source document have been converted to unordered lists in the JSON output. Furthermore, the item numbers (e.g., '1.', '2.') have been stripped from the content of the list items, resulting in a loss of the original structural meaning.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Ordered lists on Page 2 (Agenda items 1-3), Page 3 (Minutes items 4-7), Page 4 (item 9), and Page 17 (ROI items 1-4).
concerns.output_quote: Reading Order 15, 18, 23, and 125 are all defined as 'list_type': 'unordered' and the numerical prefix is removed from the text content.

action_items: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.
